network.tdh.hero.title: TDH
network.tdh.hero.intro: TDH (Total Days Held) is our time-weighted holding metric. Each NFT you hold contributes its days-held to your total. We then multiply by edition-size weights and apply collection "boosters" based on what you hold.
network.tdh.how.title: How TDH is computed
network.tdh.how.unweighted.title: Unweighted days:
network.tdh.how.unweighted.body: each NFT contributes 1 per day it's held.
network.tdh.how.edition.title: Edition weighting:
network.tdh.how.edition.body: we scale by edition size with FirstGM ({editionSize}) as 1.
network.tdh.how.boosters.title: Boosts:
network.tdh.how.boosters.body: we multiply by the higher of Category A or B, then add Category C. (Details below.)
network.tdh.current.title: TDH 1.4 ({date} — present)
network.tdh.current.intro: Higher of Category A and Category B boosters, plus Category C boosters.
network.tdh.current.categoryA.title: Category A
network.tdh.current.categoryA.completeSe: A complete set of all Meme Cards:
network.tdh.current.categoryA.additional: Additional complete sets add to the total TDH (no cap):
network.tdh.current.categoryA.maximumTit: Maximum theoretical Category A boost (infinite sets):
network.tdh.current.categoryB.title: Category B
network.tdh.current.categoryB.applies: Applied to the total TDH, not just that season's TDH:
network.tdh.current.categoryC.title: Category C
network.tdh.current.categoryC.gradientTa: per Gradient (up to a maximum of {count})
network.tdh.related.historic.title: View Historic Boosts
network.tdh.related.definitions.title: Definitions
network.tdh.related.stats.title: Network TDH Stats
network.tdh.related.stats.description: Aggregate community activity, holdings, trading, and time-based metrics across the network.
network.tdh.related.levels.title: Levels
network.tdh.related.levels.description: Our integrated progression that combines TDH with Rep (peer-given reputation points).
